title: T1178 General Index of Financial Information - Short - Canada.ca
content:
## T1178 General Index of Financial Information - Short
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
The form used by corporations to file financial information in the GIFI format.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-23e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2020 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-20e.pdf) 2018 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-18e.pdf) 2016 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-16e.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-14e.pdf) 2011 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-11e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-23e.pdf)
This form is also available for the years listed below:
- 2020 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-20e.pdf)
- 2018 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-18e.pdf)
- 2016 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-16e.pdf)
- 2014 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-14e.pdf)
- 2011 – Fillable PDF (t1178-fill-11e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (t1178-23e.pdf) Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2020 – Standard print PDF (t1178-20e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (t1178-18e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (t1178-16e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (t1178-14e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (t1178-11e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (t1178-08e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t1178-06e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (t1178-05e.pdf) 2004 – Standard print PDF (t1178-04e.pdf) 2001 – Standard print PDF (t1178-01e.pdf)

- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- RC4088 General Index of Financial Information (GIFI)
